{{Quote|No need to fire you now. If they don't kill you, I will.|Yas'tua to Rak'k about the sith, after telling Alema Rar he has a working swoop|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
'''Yas'tua''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] living on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He was a member of the Korriban spaceport's ground crew, and was the taskmaster of [[Rak'k]] and a [[Unidentified Korriban ground crewman|Human]]. The trio met [[Alema Rar]] when she landed at the spaceport, and Rak'k told her the location of the [[One Sith]] over Yas'tua's objections. Alema then stole Yas'tua's [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] from him to use as transport to the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]].
